Description: The subject line from the email that was sent.
The date when the email was sent.
E-mail addresses or UniqNames of the recipients of this email, separated by commas or one per line.
The person who sent the email.
The team with ownership of this email communication.
The program associated with this email.
Copy of the email that was sent.
Email recipients (linked to People list).
A narrative of the outcome of this email.
The total number of recipients, excluding duplicates (such as when emails are sent to both a preferred and primary email).
The number of recipients who are already in the People list, meaning there has been some kind of engagement prior to sending this email.
The number of recipients who were added to the People list.
The email open rate, as reported by the app used to send or track the emails.
The email click rate, as reported by the app used to send or track the emails.
Custom tags and keywords for searching.
Email recipients, linked to People list (UniqName).
School affiliations for the email recipients that are linked to the People list.
If checked, TrackMaster will copy these tags to the People list record for each email recipient. The tag sync process can take a few hours, and it will uncheck this box once complete.
System field used by automations to keep track of the last version that was modified automatically. This helps prevent infinite loops.
System field used by automations to keep track of the last workflow that modified this item. This helps prevent infinite loops.
If this email was sent to a group, enter the group here, so the recipients can be extracted from that group. The group must already be configured in the Groups List.
List of MCommunity groups to whom the email was sent. Auto-populated based on the Recipient Groups field.
The display name used to refer back to this email from other lists. Auto-calculated.
